nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 白额燕尾
nodes.summary: 白额燕尾（White-crowned forktail，学名 Enicurus leschenaulti），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于中华人民共和国、东南亚，常见栖息地包括山地河流、山地森林。

nodes.name: 中华人民共和国
nodes.summary: 中华人民共和国是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联285种鸟类，包括青头潜鸭、花脸鸭、黄腹角雉等285种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地河流
nodes.summary: 冷水、清澈且流速较高的繁殖河流环境。

nodes.name: 东南亚
nodes.summary: 东南亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联160种鸟类，包括棉鳧、琵嘴鸭、勺嘴鹬等160种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-crowned forktail is found in China, Southeast Asia and also in northeastern parts of the Indian subcontinent

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-crowned forktail is found in China, Southeast Asia and also in northeastern parts of the Indian subcontinent

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The habitat of the white-crowned forktail is subtropical or tropical regions in moist lowland forests and moist broadleaf montane forests. As is the case with other forktail species, the white-crowned forktail frequents fast-flowing rivers, waterfalls, and streams within the forests, though it may move to slower moving water sources in the winter. Its elevational range has been observed to vary seasonally, and in the northeastern regions of the Indian subcontinent, it is likely to migrate seasonally; all records from Bangladesh are from winter months. It also frequents damp areas and pools within the forest, including animal wallows, swampy areas, and water ditches

Its elevational range has been observed to vary seasonally, and in the northeastern regions of the Indian subcontinent, it is likely to migrate seasonally; all records from Bangladesh are from winter months. It also frequents damp areas and pools within the forest, including animal wallows, swampy areas, and water ditches
